mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_withdraw_request ( user_id, amount, status, bank_account_id, bank_name_snapshot, account_masked_snapshot, internal_payout_ref, requested_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{bankAccountId}, #{bankNameSnapshot}, #{accountMaskedSnapshot}, #{internalPayoutRef}, #{requestedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, amount, status, bank_account_id, bank_name_snapshot, account_masked_snapshot, requested_at, processed_at, processed_by, reject_reason, external_tx_id, internal_payout_ref, created_at, updated_at FROM point_withdraw_request WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, amount, status, bank_account_id, bank_name_snapshot, account_masked_snapshot, requested_at, processed_at, processed_by, reject_reason, external_tx_id, internal_payout_ref, created_at, updated_at FROM point_withdraw_request WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, user_id, amount, status, bank_account_id, bank_name_snapshot, account_masked_snapshot, requested_at, processed_at, processed_by, reject_reason, external_tx_id, internal_payout_ref, created_at, updated_at FROM point_withdraw_request WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE point_withdraw_request SET status = #{newStatus}, processed_at = NOW(), processed_by = #{processedBy}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, external_tx_id = #{externalTxId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'REQUESTED'
